testcase.name: exclusivity_differentTypes_independent
testcase.system-err: [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.ExclusivityManager - Exclusivity lock acquired: type=type_a [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.ExclusivityManager - Exclusivity lock acquired: type=type_b

testcase.name: validate_afterClear_throwsStaleLeaseException
testcase.system-err: [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.LeaseManager - Lease issued: jobId=263c8271-0d3b-4381-b2de-ff03c930bc17, token=e27cef34-7f56-4843-a301-121c5632d8f7, expiresAt=1779971519328 [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.LeaseManager - Lease cleared: jobId=263c8271-0d3b-4381-b2de-ff03c930bc17 [main] WARN com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.LeaseManager - Stale lease rejected: jobId=263c8271-0d3b-4381-b2de-ff03c930bc17, presented=e27cef34-7f56-4843-a301-121c5632d8f7, current=null

testcase.name: markBusy_and_markIdle_updatesStats
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.WorkerRegistry - Worker registered: workerId=w1, types=[t] [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.WorkerRegistry - Worker busy: workerId=w1, jobId=job-1 [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.WorkerRegistry - Worker idle: workerId=w1

testcase.name: release_allowsReacquire
testcase.system-err: [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.ExclusivityManager - Exclusivity lock acquired: type=resize_image [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.ExclusivityManager - Exclusivity lock released: type=resize_image [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.ExclusivityManager - Exclusivity lock acquired: type=resize_image

testcase.name: clearLease_nullsTokenAndExpiry
testcase.system-err: [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.LeaseManager - Lease issued: jobId=4b72849b-c9e1-446e-a809-ff00b9c40f96, token=2c55d39f-8e63-4a88-af4f-345d07ac75ac, expiresAt=1779971519332 [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.LeaseManager - Lease cleared: jobId=4b72849b-c9e1-446e-a809-ff00b9c40f96

testcase.name: findWorkerByLeaseToken_returnsCorrectWorker
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.WorkerRegistry - Worker registered: workerId=w1, types=[t] [main] INFO com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.WorkerRegistry - Worker registered: workerId=w2, types=[t] [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.WorkerRegistry - Worker busy: workerId=w1, jobId=job-1

testcase.name: tryAcquire_whileLocked_fails
testcase.system-err: [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.ExclusivityManager - Exclusivity lock acquired: type=resize_image [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.ExclusivityManager - Exclusivity lock busy — skipping dispatch: type=resize_image

testcase.name: exclusivity_concurrentAcquire_onlyOneSucceeds

testcase.name: validate_wrongToken_throwsStaleLeaseException
testcase.system-err: [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.LeaseManager - Lease issued: jobId=49bdb00c-9124-4bdd-be77-4de530189047, token=0d714557-ed74-4e0e-a0cb-71809a5f12b2, expiresAt=1779971519336 [main] WARN com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.LeaseManager - Stale lease rejected: jobId=49bdb00c-9124-4bdd-be77-4de530189047, presented=wrong-token, current=0d714557-ed74-4e0e-a0cb-71809a5f12b2

testcase.name: allStats_returnsAllWorkers

testcase.name: extend_increasesExpiry

testcase.name: isLocked_reflectsState
testcase.system-err: [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.ExclusivityManager - Exclusivity lock acquired: type=t [main] DEBUG com.demo.backgroundjobservice.service.ExclusivityManager - Exclusivity lock released: type=t
